# Windsurf Editor Changelog - Comprehensive Summary

## Latest Versions & Features

**Current Release (March 19, 2026): Version 1.9577.43**
- Mac x64 build fixes

**Major Recent Releases:**
- **1.9577.42** (March 19): Performance improvements
- **1.9577.27** (March 12): Apple M5 support fix
- **1.9577.24** (March 9): Cascade improvements, MCP enhancements, Jupyter Notebook optimizations

## Model Availability

**Recently Added Models:**
- GPT-5.4 Mini (promotional pricing starting at 1x credits)
- GPT-5.4 (limited-time promotional pricing)
- Gemini 3.1 Pro (0.5x-1x credits)
- Claude Sonnet 4.6 (2-3x credits)
- GLM-5 & Minimax M2.5 (0.75x and 0.25x credits respectively)
- Claude Opus 4.6 & fast mode variants
- GPT-5.2-Codex with reasoning effort options
- SWE-1.5 Free (available for 3 months)
- Gemini 3 Flash

## Core Features

**Cascade Agent:**
- Plan Mode for implementation planning
- Git worktree support for parallel sessions
- Multi-cascade panes and tabs for side-by-side monitoring
- Cascade Hooks for custom command execution
- Context window indicator showing usage levels
- Auto-continue setting for extended responses
- Terminal command editing capabilities

**Arena Mode:**
Comparative evaluation through "side-by-side model comparison with hidden identities" and voting systems, featuring Battle Groups and leaderboards.

**Advanced Capabilities:**
- Voice input support
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) server integration
- Web/docs search functionality
- Memories system for context retention
- Codemaps for codebase visualization
- Vibe and Replace for intelligent find-and-replace
- Fast Context powered by SWE-grep (20x faster, 2,800+ tokens/second)

## Enterprise & Team Features

- MDM-managed system-level Skill definitions
- Team conversation sharing with secure URLs
- Windsurf Reviews GitHub app integration
- Knowledge curation via Google Docs
- Cascade Hooks cloud configuration
- Team-wide command allow/deny lists
- Windows Group Policy administration support

## Platform Improvements

- Linux ARM64 support with deb/rpm packaging
- Dev Container support (Windows beta, Mac/Linux available)
- Remote SSH improvements
- WSL compatibility enhancements
- VS Code 1.108 base merge

## UI/UX Enhancements

- Redesigned model picker with family grouping
- New announcement notification system
- Improved Cascade panel rendering
- Theme-aware code blocks
- Sticky scroll lag fixes
- Terminal rendering optimization

## Developer Tools

- Jupyter Notebook support improvements
- Shell command auto-execution with safety lists
- Deployment to Netlify via natural language
- Commit message generation
- Auto-linting for proposed code changes
- File-based Rules system (.windsurf/rules)
- Workflow creation and management

## Known Fixes & Stability

- Memory leak resolutions
- SSH/remote performance improvements
- Autocomplete error handling
- RTL language rendering in todo lists
- MCP OAuth authentication improvements
- Vim extension typing lag resolution
- PowerShell Turbo Mode compatibility
